span.p:
load_data
chuẩn hóa Date, sort, audit

span.p:
Tạo target
Revenue, COGS, COGS ratio

build_feature_frame
calendar, Fourier, event, promotion plan

COGS direct
seasonal anchor + XGBoost heads

Kalman residual gate
chỉ giữ nếu OOF MAE tốt hơn

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
COGS reconciliation
alpha * COGS_direct + (1-alpha) * Revenue * ratio
